title: Health & Emergencies
shortSummary: Describe symptoms, see a doctor, and get help fast in an emergency.
culturalNote: France has an excellent healthcare system, and pharmacies, marked with a green cross, are everywhere and staffed by pharmacists who can advise on minor problems. The European emergency number is 112; the SAMU (medical) is 15 and the police is 17. Carrying your symptoms written in French on your phone helps a lot at a clinic or pharmacy.

keyPhrases.native: Je ne me sens pas bien
keyPhrases.pronunciation: zhuh nuh muh son pah bee-AN

grammar.explanation: To say something hurts, use avoir mal à plus the body part: j'ai mal à la tête (headache), j'ai mal au dos (backache), j'ai mal aux dents (toothache). The à contracts with le and les.
grammar.commonMistake: Forgetting the contraction: it is mal au dos and mal aux dents, not mal à le dos.

grammar.explanation: To say you are allergic to something, use être allergique à: Je suis allergique aux arachides (I'm allergic to peanuts). Remember the contraction with les: aux.
grammar.commonMistake: Dropping à: the frame is être allergique à plus the thing.

dialogue.setup: Léa visits a pharmacy because she is not feeling well.

lines.speaker: Pharmacien
lines.native: Bonjour, qu'est-ce qui ne va pas ?

lines.speaker: Léa
lines.native: J'ai mal à la tête et j'ai de la fièvre.
lines.english: I have a headache and a fever.

lines.speaker: Pharmacien
lines.english: Since when have you had these symptoms?

lines.speaker: Pharmacien
lines.english: Are you allergic to any medicine?

lines.speaker: Pharmacien
lines.native: Prenez ces comprimés et reposez-vous bien.
lines.english: Take these tablets and rest well.

quiz.question: How do you say 'I have a headache'?
quiz.explanation: avoir mal à plus the body part (la tête).

quiz.question: Je suis allergique _____ chats. (to the, plural)
Which means 'It's an emergency'?
quiz.explanation: C'est une urgence means 'it's an emergency'.

quiz.question: Which means 'I have a fever'?
quiz.explanation: J'ai de la fièvre means 'I have a fever'.

quiz.question: Arrange: médecin / besoin / d'un / j'ai
quiz.explanation: J'ai besoin de (I need) plus 'un médecin'.
